_legend: dummy programs grounded in real IITP services
heading: Student Welfare

intro.value: Practical support for the moments that matter — health, money, belonging, and a safe place to raise concerns.

programs.title: Health Centre & Emergency Care
programs.body: On-campus health centre with a doctor room in hostels and emergency support.

programs.title: Counselling & Mental Wellness
programs.body: Confidential counselling, peer support groups, and wellness workshops.

programs.title: Scholarships & Financial Assistance
programs.body: Guidance on merit and need-based scholarships, fee concessions and emergency aid.

programs.title: Inclusion Cells
programs.body: SC/ST/OBC Cell and Women's Grievance Redressal / Internal Complaints Committee (WGRC/ICC).

programs.title: Anti-Ragging
programs.body: Zero-tolerance policy with strict action per Supreme Court guidelines.

programs.title: International & New-Student Support
programs.body: Orientation, mentorship and settling-in help for first-year and international students.
